response.justification: Bogdan has over 6 years of full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and cloud tools like AWS CDK and Docker, directly matching the required stack and responsibilities; his work on AI-agent infrastructure, API integrations, and open-source tooling demonstrates strong architectural and cross-stack capabilities, with notable depth in testing and process improvement.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React)
Proven work on AI-agent systems and internal tooling aligned with automation goals
Strong DevOps and testing culture (Docker, CI/CD, Vitest-equivalent frameworks)
concerns: Limited explicit mention of Nest.js or Vitest in resume
German language proficiency is only basic, may hinder local collaboration
Diverse background includes many niche languages (DLang, Java) which may dilute focus
